cases.prompt: Set up Azure Key Vault so an app can read secrets securely.

expect.label: app authenticates with a managed identity, no secrets in code/config
prefer Azure RBAC over legacy access policies, least privilege
enable soft delete and purge protection
restrict with private endpoints / disable public access for sensitive vaults

cases.prompt: How should I isolate vaults and keep secrets fresh?

expect.label: one vault per app per environment to limit blast radius
automate rotation and set expiry / monitor near-expiry
